content:
If you're building SaaS products with AI coding tools, this free template might save you some time.

It comes in three versions — React, Vue, and plain HTML — all built on Tailwind CSS v4. It's designed specifically to be dropped into an AI coding agent project. Just drop the folder next to your project and ask Claude Code, Cursor, or Codex to wire it up.

The HTML version has zero build step — it loads Tailwind from CDN and runs instantly in a browser, which makes it perfect for quick prototypes or agent-assisted projects.

Live demo: https://saadesign.io/saas-landing-page

GitHub repo: https://github.com/hannah-wright/saas-landing-page-template

Free and open source — star it on GitHub if you find it useful!
